task_description: Add a CSV export endpoint to the admin dashboard that streams governance observability data using FastAPI's StreamingResponse, with data aggregated from existing metrics in the evaluation layer

entries.pattern: Generator-based streaming with reuse of existing aggregation methods
entries.description: Service layer method returns Iterator[str] / yields CSV rows. Aggregates via existing statistical methods (get_mode_distribution, get_constraint_frequency, detect_flips, get_abstain_rate_trend, get_total_queries). Route uses FastAPI StreamingResponse with media_type='text/csv'. Error handling localised inside the generator since handle_api_errors can't catch mid-stream exceptions.
Uses StreamingResponse correctly but writes new SQL queries/aggregations instead of composing existing stats methods. Violates non-destructive integration constraint.
Materialises the whole export in memory before returning. Fails scalability / memory-efficiency constraint in the prompt.

entries.pattern: Does not address CSV / governance stats at all
entries.description: Plan targets unrelated functionality or never reaches the streaming/generator insight.
